sqlMap.select: select * from WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey NumberOfEstateOver1Million NumberOfEstateOver5Million NumberOfEstateOver10Million IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient IsMemCertLegalSpecialist IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork IsApplEmployAccountants IsApplEmployTaxAttorney IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice IsApplObtainCertificate ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsApplHaveControlOverFunds IsCounterSignatureRequired IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #NumberOfEstateOver1Million# #NumberOfEstateOver5Million# #NumberOfEstateOver10Million# #IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient# #IsMemCertLegalSpecialist# #IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney# #IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork# #IsApplEmployAccountants# #IsApplEmployTaxAttorney# #IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice# #IsApplObtainCertificate# #ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsApplHaveControlOverFunds# #IsCounterSignatureRequired# #IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank# #IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage# )
sqlMap.select: select NumberOfEstateOver1Million, NumberOfEstateOver5Million, NumberOfEstateOver10Million, IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient, IsMemCertLegalSpecialist, IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney, IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork, IsApplEmployAccountants, IsApplEmployTaxAttorney, IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice, IsApplObtainCertificate, ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplHaveControlOverFunds, IsCounterSignatureRequired, IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank, IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW set
NumberOfEstateOver1Million = #NumberOfEstateOver1Million# NumberOfEstateOver1Million = null NumberOfEstateOver5Million = #NumberOfEstateOver5Million# NumberOfEstateOver5Million = null NumberOfEstateOver10Million = #NumberOfEstateOver10Million# NumberOfEstateOver10Million = null IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient = #IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient# IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient = null IsMemCertLegalSpecialist = #IsMemCertLegalSpecialist# IsMemCertLegalSpecialist = null IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney = #IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney# IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney = null IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork = #IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork# IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork = null IsApplEmployAccountants = #IsApplEmployAccountants# IsApplEmployAccountants = null IsApplEmployTaxAttorney = #IsApplEmployTaxAttorney# IsApplEmployTaxAttorney = null IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice = #IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice# IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice = null IsApplObtainCertificate = #IsApplObtainCertificate# IsApplObtainCertificate = null ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient = #ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient# ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsApplHaveControlOverFunds = #IsApplHaveControlOverFunds# IsApplHaveControlOverFunds = null IsCounterSignatureRequired = #IsCounterSignatureRequired# IsCounterSignatureRequired = null IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank = #IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank# IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank = null IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage = #IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage# IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select NumberOfEstateOver1Million, NumberOfEstateOver5Million, NumberOfEstateOver10Million, IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient, IsMemCertLegalSpecialist, IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney, IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork, IsApplEmployAccountants, IsApplEmployTaxAttorney, IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice, IsApplObtainCertificate, ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplHaveControlOverFunds, IsCounterSignatureRequired, IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank, IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, NumberOfEstateOver1Million, NumberOfEstateOver5Million, NumberOfEstateOver10Million, IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient, IsMemCertLegalSpecialist, IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney, IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork, IsApplEmployAccountants, IsApplEmployTaxAttorney, IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice, IsApplObtainCertificate, ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplHaveControlOverFunds, IsCounterSignatureRequired, IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank, IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage from WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
